function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), inspected 99_system per root rulebook, used canonical cast records for birthdays.
function.outcome_justification: Current date from context is 2026-03-30. Birthday search across 10_entities/cast showed the nearest future month-day as 05-21, and canonical file 10_entities/cast/tobias.md confirms that birthday and exact name Tobias Kern. No matching same date appeared in the birthday search results, so no tie to include.
